UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Ora Prochovnick; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Bhagubhai Patel is present.
Attorney Lisa Padilla for the plaintiff.
Defendant Craig West is present.
Attorney Hanna Kim for defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of May-07-2018 is vacated. (501)
